stemHtml:
Which statements can be characterised as examples of procedural errors according to TEM model?

1. Systems, radio, instruments: incorrect packs, incorrect anti-icing, incorrect altimeter, incorrect fuel switch settings, incorrect speed bug, or incorrect radio frequency dialled
2. Ground navigation: attempting to turn onto the wrong taxiway or runway, taxiing too fast, failure to hold short, or missed taxiway or runway
3. Call-outs: omitted or incorrect call-outs
4. Pilot to pilot: crew miscommunication or misinterpretation
